name: Master Ball
desc: The best Poké Ball with the ultimate level ofperformance. With it, you will catch any wildPokémon without fail.

name: Ultra Ball
desc: An ultra-high-performance Poké Ball that providesa higher success rate for catching Pokémon thana Great Ball.

name: Great Ball
desc: A good, high-performance Poké Ball that providesa higher success rate for catching Pokémon thana standard Poké Ball.

name: Poké Ball
desc: A device for catching wild Pokémon. It’s thrown likea ball at a Pokémon, comfortably encapsulatingits target.

name: Safari Ball
desc: A special Poké Ball that was used in the Safari Zonein the Kanto region and in the Great Marsh in theSinnoh region.

name: Net Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is moreeffective when attempting to catch Water- orBug-type Pokémon.

name: Dive Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that worksespecially well when catching Pokémon thatlive underwater.

name: Nest Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes moreeffective the lower the level of the wild Pokémon.

name: Repeat Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that worksespecially well on a Pokémon species that has beencaught before.

name: Timer Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomesprogressively more effective at catching Pokémonthe more turns that are taken in battle.

name: Luxury Ball
desc: A particularly comfortable Poké Ball that makes awild Pokémon quickly grow friendlier afterbeing caught.

name: Premier Ball
desc: A somewhat rare Poké Ball that was made as acommemorative item used to celebrate an event ofsome sort.

name: Dusk Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that makes iteasier to catch wild Pokémon at night or in darkplaces such as caves.

name: Heal Ball
desc: A remedial Poké Ball that restores the HP of aPokémon caught with it and eliminates anystatus conditions.

name: Quick Ball
desc: A somewhat different Poké Ball that has a moresuccessful catch rate if used at the start of awild encounter.

name: Cherish Ball
desc: A quite rare Poké Ball that has been crafted inorder to commemorate a special occasion ofsome sort.

name: Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to restore 20 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Antidote
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating poisoning. It can beused to lift the effects of being poisoned froma single Pokémon.

name: Burn Heal
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating burns. It can beused to heal a single Pokémon suffering from a burn.

name: Ice Heal

name: Awakening

name: Paralyze Heal

name: Full Restore

name: Max Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to completely restore the max HP ofa single Pokémon.

name: Hyper Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to restore 120 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Super Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to restore 60 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Full Heal
desc: A spray-type medicine that is broadly effective.It can be used to heal all the status conditionsof a single Pokémon.

name: Revive

name: Max Revive

name: Fresh Water

name: Soda Pop

name: Lemonade

name: Moomoo Milk

name: Energy Powder
desc: A very bitter medicinal powder. It can be used torestore 60 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Energy Root
desc: An extremely bitter medicinal root. It can be used torestore 120 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Heal Powder

name: Revival Herb

name: Ether

name: Max Ether

name: Elixir

name: Max Elixir

name: Lava Cookie

name: Berry Juice

name: Sacred Ash

name: HP Up

name: Protein

name: Iron

name: Carbos

name: Calcium

name: Rare Candy

name: PP Up

name: Zinc

name: PP Max

name: X Speed

name: Fluffy Tail

name: White Flute

name: Shoal Salt
desc: Salt that you found inside Shoal Cave.

name: Shoal Shell

name: Red Shard

name: Yellow Shard

name: Green Shard

name: Max Repel

name: Escape Rope

name: Repel
desc: An item that prevents any low-level wild Pokémonfrom jumping out at you for a while.

name: Sun Stone

name: Forage Bag

desc: Use it by the water to fish up various kinds of Pokémon.

desc: A ticket that allows you to host a mission inFestival Plaza.

name: Moon Flute

name: Enigmatic Card

desc: A stone found in the Galar region with a mysterious power.It’s said that your dreams come true if you find one.

desc: A Wishing Star has been affixed to it. It lets out a lightthat allows Pokémon to Dynamax when at a Power Spot.

desc: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the waterusing Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black thatshines reddish-black.

desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. These sausages should beboiled before eating.

desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. When simmered, the beanssuffuse a dish with their mild flavor.

name: Pasta
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. These flour noodles makefor a surprisingly good match with curry.

name: Mixed Mushrooms
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. The chewy texture of themushrooms transforms any dish they’re added to.

name: Smoke-Poke Tail
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. When a Slowpoke’s tail falls off,it grows back quickly.

name: Large Leek
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Whether this is the kind ofvegetable stalk that Farfetch’d like is unknown.

name: Fancy Apple
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. An apple chosen above others.It has spectacular form and a brilliant sheen.

name: Brittle Bones
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. The taste boiled off from thebones is sure to give a dish a light umami taste.

name: Pack of Potatoes
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Potatoes help mellow out a spicytaste, to make a dish more mild.

name: Pungent Root
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Though carelessly picked, theseherbs can add a fragrant accent to a dish.

name: Salad Mix
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. The assortment of vegetableslooks quite appealing and healthy.

name: Fried Food
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. It’s been a while since it wasfried, so it’s gotten greasy.

name: Boiled Egg
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Even just one boiled egg canreally enhance a dish.

name: Camping Gear
desc: Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking ina Wild Area or at a camping spot.

name: Rusted Sword
desc: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terribledisaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

name: Rusted Shield
desc: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terribledisaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

name: Fossilized Bird
desc: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once soaredthrough the sky. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Fossilized Fish
desc: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in thesea. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Fossilized Drake
desc: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once roamed theland. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Fossilized Dino
desc: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in thesea. What it looked like is a mystery.

name: Strawberry Sweet
desc: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it will spin around happily.

name: Love Sweet
desc: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it spins around happily.

name: Berry Sweet
desc: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it spins around happily.

name: Clover Sweet
desc: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it spins around happily.

name: Flower Sweet
desc: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it spins around happily.

name: Star Sweet
desc: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it spins around happily.

name: Ribbon Sweet
desc: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milceryholds this, it spins around happily.

name: Sweet Apple
desc: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species ofPokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally sweet.

name: Tart Apple
desc: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species ofPokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally tart.

name: Throat Spray
desc: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-basedmove.

name: Eject Pack
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder’sstats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

name: Heavy-Duty Boots
desc: These boots prevent the effects of traps set onthe battlefield.

name: Blunder Policy
desc: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with amove because of accuracy.

name: Room Service
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed whenTrick Room takes effect.

name: Utility Umbrella
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sturdy umbrellaprotects the holder from the effects of rain andharsh sunlight.

name: Exp. Candy XS
desc: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, itwill grant a single Pokémon a very small amount ofExp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy S
desc: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, itwill grant a single Pokémon a small amount ofExp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy M
desc: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, itwill grant a single Pokémon a moderate amount ofExp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy L
desc: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, itwill grant a single Pokémon a large amount ofExp. Points.

name: Exp. Candy XL
desc: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, itwill grant a single Pokémon a very large amount ofExp. Points.

name: Dynamax Candy
desc: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, itwill raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon byone. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

name: TR00
desc: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit.This sharply raises the user’s Attack stat.

name: TR01
desc: The user drops onto the target with its full bodyweight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: TR02
desc: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire.This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: TR03
desc: The target is blasted by a huge volume of waterlaunched under great pressure.

name: TR04
desc: The user attacks everything around it by swampingits surroundings with a giant wave.

name: TR05
desc: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy.This may also leave the target frozen.

name: TR06
desc: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposingPokémon. This may also leave the opposingPokémon frozen.

name: TR07
desc: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over.The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

name: TR08
desc: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target.This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: TR09
desc: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target toinflict damage. This may also leave the targetwith paralysis.

name: TR10
desc: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes everyPokémon around it.

name: TR11
desc: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force.This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR12
desc: The user relaxes and lightens its body to movefaster. This sharply raises the Speed stat.

name: TR13
desc: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so thatcritical hits land more easily.

name: TR14
desc: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its braininto randomly using nearly any move.

name: TR15
desc: The target is attacked with an intense blast ofall-consuming fire. This may also leave the targetwith a burn.

name: TR16
desc: The user charges at the target and may makeit flinch.

name: TR17
desc: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget itsconcerns. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR18
desc: The user drains the target’s blood. The user’s HP isrestored by half the damage taken by the target.

name: TR19
desc: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack.This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

name: TR20
desc: The user creates a substitute for itself using some ofits HP. The substitute serves as the user’s decoy.

name: TR21
desc: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful theless HP the user has.

name: TR22
desc: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. This mayalso poison the target.

name: TR23
desc: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposingteam’s feet. The trap hurts Pokémon that switchinto battle.

name: TR24
desc: The user rampages and attacks for two to threeturns. The user then becomes confused.

name: TR25
desc: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attackthe target. This attack does physical damage.

name: TR26
desc: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP.Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

name: TR27
desc: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of themoves it knows.

name: TR28
desc: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user ramsinto the target with no letup.

name: TR29
desc: The user switches places with a party Pokémon inwaiting and passes along any stat changes.

name: TR30
desc: The user compels the target to keep using the moveit encored for three turns.

name: TR31
desc: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail.This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

name: TR32
desc: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs.This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

name: TR33
desc: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target.This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR34
desc: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychicenergy attacks the target.

name: TR35
desc: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns.During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

name: TR36
desc: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposingPokémon. This may also leave those Pokémon witha burn.

name: TR37
desc: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to useonly attack moves for three turns.

name: TR38
desc: The user catches the target off guard and swaps itsheld item with its own.

name: TR39
desc: The user attacks the target with great power.However, this also lowers the user’s Attack andDefense stats.

name: TR40
desc: The user employs its psychic power to exchangeAbilities with the target.

name: TR41
desc: The user launches a kick that lands a critical hitmore easily. This may also leave the target witha burn.

name: TR42
desc: The user lets loose a horribly echoing shout withthe power to inflict damage.

name: TR43
desc: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack’srecoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: TR44
desc: The user absorbs a mystical power from space toraise its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

name: TR45
desc: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposingPokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

name: TR46
desc: The user hardens its body’s surface like iron,sharply raising its Defense stat.

name: TR47
desc: The user slashes the target with huge sharp claws.

name: TR48
desc: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body,raising both its Attack and Defense stats.

name: TR49
desc: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms itsspirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

name: TR50
desc: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword andattacks by cutting its target. Critical hits landmore easily.

name: TR51
desc: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerfuldance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

name: TR52
desc: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin.The slower the user compared to the target, thegreater the move’s power.

name: TR53
desc: The user fights the target up close without guardingitself. This also lowers the user’s Defense andSp. Def stats.

name: TR54
desc: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet ofthe opposing team. The spikes will poison opposingPokémon that switch into battle.

name: TR55
desc: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target.This also damages the user quite a lot. This attackmay leave the target with a burn.

name: TR56
desc: The user lets loose a blast of aura power from deepwithin its body at the target. This attacknever misses.

name: TR57
desc: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, arm, or the likesteeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

name: TR58
desc: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with darkthoughts. This may also make the target flinch.

name: TR59
desc: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seedsdown on the target from above.

name: TR60
desc: The user slashes at the target by crossing itsscythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

name: TR61
desc: The user generates a damaging sound wave byvibration. This may also lower the target’sSp. Def stat.

name: TR62
desc: The target is attacked with a shock wave generatedby the user’s gaping mouth.

name: TR63
desc: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles asif it were made of gemstones.

name: TR64
desc: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashesits power. This may also lower the target’sSp. Def stat.

name: TR65
desc: The user draws power from nature and fires it at thetarget. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: TR66
desc: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a lowaltitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

name: TR67
desc: The user makes the ground under the target eruptwith power. This may also lower the target’sSp. Def stat.

name: TR68
desc: The user stimulates its brain by thinking badthoughts. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: TR69
desc: The user focuses its willpower to its head andattacks the target. This may also make thetarget flinch.

name: TR70
desc: The user gathers all its light energy and releases itall at once. This may also lower the target’sSp. Def stat.

name: TR71
desc: The user whips up a storm of leaves around thetarget. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’sSp. Atk stat.

name: TR72
desc: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or thelike to harshly lash the target.

name: TR73
desc: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target toattack. This may also poison the target.

name: TR74
desc: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head.This may also make the target flinch.

name: TR75
desc: The user stabs the target from below withsharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily.

name: TR76
desc: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around theopposing team. The trap hurts opposing Pokémonthat switch into battle.

name: TR77
desc: The user snares the target with grass and trips it.The heavier the target, the greater themove’s power.

name: TR78
desc: The user strikes everything around it by swampingthe area with a giant sludge wave. This may alsopoison those hit.

name: TR79
desc: The user slams into the target with its heavy body.The more the user outweighs the target, the greaterthe move’s power.

name: TR80
desc: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. Thefaster the user is than the target, the greater themove’s power.

name: TR81
desc: The user turns the target’s power against it.The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greaterthe damage it deals.

name: TR82
desc: The user attacks the target with stored power.The more the user’s stats are raised, the greaterthe move’s power.

name: TR83
desc: The user teleports using a strange power andswitches places with one of its allies.

name: TR84
desc: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target.This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: TR85
desc: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atkstats increase.

name: TR86
desc: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashesinto its target. This also damages the user a little.

name: TR87
desc: The user crashes into its target while rotating itsbody like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

name: TR88
desc: The user slams its target with its flame-coveredbody. The more the user outweighs the target, thegreater the move’s power.

name: TR89
desc: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in afierce wind that flies up into the sky. This may alsoconfuse the target.

name: TR90
desc: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it.This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.

name: TR91
desc: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an oddpoisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, andSpeed stats of a poisoned target.

name: TR92
desc: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting apowerful flash.

name: TR93
desc: The user swings both arms and hits the target.The target’s stat changes don’t affect thisattack’s damage.

name: TR94
desc: The user fiercely attacks the target using itsentire body.

name: TR95
desc: The user attacks the target’s throat, and theresultant suffering prevents the target from usingmoves that emit sound for two turns.

name: TR96
desc: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff thatexplodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally apollen puff that restores its HP instead.

name: TR97
desc: The user bites the target with its psychiccapabilities. This can also destroy Light Screenand Reflect.

name: TR98
desc: The user slams into the target using a full-forceblast of water. This may also lower the target’sDefense stat.

name: TR99
desc: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target.The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it caninflict on the target.

name: TM00
desc: The target is slugged by a punch thrown withmuscle-packed power.

name: Wishing Piece
desc: Throw one into a Pokémon Den to attracta wild Dynamax Pokémon.

name: Cracked Pot
desc: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species ofPokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea pouredfrom it is delicious.

name: Chipped Pot
desc: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species ofPokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea pouredfrom it is delicious.

name: Hi-tech Earbuds
desc: Strange earbuds that allow you to freely control thevolume of various sounds.

name: Fruit Bunch
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. The syrupy fruits give off a strongtropical feel.

name: Moomoo Cheese
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Melted cheese can really give acurry some richness.

name: Spice Mix
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. There are over fifty spicescontained within this ingredient’s hot flavor.

name: Fresh Cream
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Add some whipped cream to aspicy curry to give it some sweetness.

name: Packaged Curry
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. Using packaged curry helpsmake sure there are no slipups when cooking.

name: Coconut Milk
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. The refined sweetness of thiscoconut milk makes it quite popular.

name: Instant Noodles
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. It has a junk-food sort of taste,but it goes well with curry.

name: Precooked Burger
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. If you’re unsure about what tocook, you can’t go wrong with some burger.

name: Gigantamix
desc: One of the many ingredients that can be used forcooking at your camp. A mysterious spice. Even a tinysprinkle is sure to make a curry gigantic.

name: Wishing Chip
desc: Toss a number of them into a Pokémon Den for thechance to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

name: Rotom Bike
desc: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the waterusing Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black thatshines reddish-black.

name: Catching Charm
desc: Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting acritical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn’t shake much.

name: Old Letter
desc: A letter entrusted to you by a girl, to be delivered toa boy. Strangely, it looks old to you.

name: Band Autograph
desc: It’s signed by all members of the Galar region’s mostcharismatic band, the Maximizers.

name: Rotom Catalog
desc: A catalog of devices that Rotom like. Use the catalogto have Rotom hop in and out of the various deviceslisted within.

name: Max Honey
desc: Honey that Dynamax Vespiquen produces. Adding thishoney to Max Soup makes the taste very smooth. It alsohas the same effect as a Max Revive.

name: Max Mushrooms
desc: Mushrooms that have the power of changing Dynamaxforms. They boost all stats of a Pokémon during battle.

name: Galarica Twig
desc: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that growsin certain areas around the Galar region. It’s a materialfor an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

name: Galarica Cuff
desc: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs.Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes thePokémon very happy.

name: Style Card
desc: A card that increases the selection in boutiques andhair salons.

name: Armor Pass
desc: A pass to go to the Isle of Armor. Show it to the railstaff at Wedgehurst Station.

name: Rotom Bike
desc: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the waterusing Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black thatshines reddish-black.

name: Rotom Bike
desc: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the waterusing Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black thatshines reddish-black.

name: Exp. Charm
desc: A charm that increases the Exp. Points that Pokémoncan get. A machine-like object is inside the charm.

name: Armorite Ore
desc: Rare ore that can be obtained on the Isle of Armor.Something good will happen if you give it to a collectoron the Isle of Armor.

name: Mark Charm
desc: A mysterious and unique charm that increases thechance of finding a Pokémon with a mark.

name: Reins of Unity
desc: Cords that shine when you hold them up to the light.The people of old times presented these to the King ofBountiful Harvests to express their gratitude.

name: Reins of Unity
desc: Cords that shine when you hold them up to the light.The people of old times presented these to the King ofBountiful Harvests to express their gratitude.

name: Galarica Wreath
desc: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs.Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makesthe Pokémon very happy.

name: Legendary Clue 1
desc: A clue about the King of Bountiful Harvests. It’s writtenby Peony, and an old photo is attached to it.

name: Legendary Clue 2
desc: A clue about the legend of giants. It’s writtenby Peony and has unique drawings.

name: Legendary Clue 3
desc: A clue about the legend of bird Pokémon. It’s writtenby Peony and has a unique drawing.

name: Legendary Clue?
desc: A mysterious clue that Peony seems to have dropped.There’s a photo attached to it showing a shining holeopening above the Max Lair.

name: Crown Pass
desc: A pass to go to the Crown Tundra. Show it to the railstaff at Wedgehurst Station.

name: Wooden Crown
desc: A mysterious object made of wood. Part of it seems tobe chipped. Maybe it’s meant to be part of something.

name: Radiant Petal
desc: A single petal that the King of Bountiful Harvestsgave you. It radiates faint light.

name: White Mane Hair
desc: Mane hair that belonged to the King of BountifulHarvests’ beloved steed, Glastrier. The hair is strongand very flexible.

name: Black Mane Hair
desc: Mane hair that belonged to the King of BountifulHarvests’ beloved steed, Spectrier. The hair is verysmooth to the touch.

name: Iceroot Carrot
desc: Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ belovedsteed likes to eat. It grew in a field covered in snow.

name: Shaderoot Carrot
desc: Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ belovedsteed likes to eat. It grew in a gloomy field.

name: Dynite Ore
desc: Mysterious ore that can be obtained in the Max Lair.Something good will happen if you give it to acollector in the Crown Tundra.

name: Carrot Seeds
desc: Seeds to plant in a field. The kind of carrot you’ll get isdetermined by which field you plant the seeds in.

name: Ability Patch
desc: A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Abilityto have a rare Ability.

name: Reins of Unity
desc: Cords that shine when you hold them up to the light.The people of old times presented these to the King ofBountiful Harvests to express their gratitude.

name: Dire Hit
desc: An item that greatly raises the critical-hit ratio ofa Pokémon during a battle. It can be used only onceand wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: Poké Ball
desc: A device for catching wild Pokémon. It’s thrown likea ball at a Pokémon, comfortably encapsulatingits target.

name: Poké Ball
desc: A device for catching wild Pokémon. It’s thrown likea ball at a Pokémon, comfortably encapsulatingits target.

name: Great Ball
desc: A good, high-performance Poké Ball that providesa higher success rate for catching Pokémon thana standard Poké Ball.

name: Ultra Ball
desc: An ultra-high-performance Poké Ball that providesa higher success rate for catching Pokémon thana Great Ball.

name: Feather Ball
desc: Can be thrown further than a regular Poké Ball.Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

name: Star Piece
desc: A small shard of a beautiful gem that gives offa distinctly red sparkle. It can be sold at a high priceto shops.

name: Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to restore 20 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Super Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to restore 60 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Hyper Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to restore 120 HP to a single Pokémon.

name: Max Potion
desc: A spray-type medicine for treating wounds. It canbe used to completely restore the max HP ofa single Pokémon.

name: Full Restore
desc: A medicine that can be used to fully restore the HP ofa single Pokémon and heal any status conditions it has.

name: Old Gateau
desc: The Old Chateau’s hidden specialty. It can be usedonce to heal all the status conditions of a Pokémon.

name: Full Heal
desc: A spray-type medicine that is broadly effective.It can be used to heal all the status conditionsof a single Pokémon.

name: Revive
desc: A medicine that can be used to revive a singlePokémon that has fainted. It also restores half ofthe Pokémon’s max HP.

name: Max Revive
desc: A medicine that can be used to revive a singlePokémon that has fainted. It also fully restoresthe Pokémon’s max HP.

name: Max Ether
desc: This medicine can be used to fully restore the PP ofa single selected move that has been learned bya Pokémon.

name: Max Elixir
desc: This medicine can be used to fully restore the PP of allof the moves that have been learned by a Pokémon.

name: Dire Hit
desc: An item that greatly raises the critical-hit ratio ofa Pokémon during a battle. It can be used only onceand wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

name: Snowball
desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts Attackif the holder is hit with an Ice-type attack. It can onlybe used once.

name: Wing Ball
desc: Can be thrown further than a Feather Ball.Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

name: Jet Ball
desc: Can be thrown further than a Wing Ball.Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

name: Heavy Ball
desc: Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémonhasn't noticed the player.

name: Leaden Ball
desc: Upgraded version of the Heavy Ball. Doesn't fly far,but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

desc: Upgraded version of the Leaden Ball. Doesn't fly far,but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

name: TM100
desc: The user tells the target a secret, and the targetloses its ability to concentrate. This lowersthe target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Meteorite
desc: A Meteorite that you got at Mt. Chimney.Some sort of pattern has risen to the surface,and it’s shining with seven colors of light.
